parts.text: Hello, what can TripSmooth help me with?
The assistant should warmly explain that it can help with flights, hotels, car rentals, and eVisa services.
Find me a flight from Lagos to London on 2026-08-15.
The assistant should route to the flights specialist and return flight options with IDs, departure/arrival times, and prices.
Book flight FL-123 for Abiola Olaleye.
The assistant should book the flight using the flight booking tool and return a booking reference.
Find hotels in Dubai from 2026-09-10 to 2026-09-15.
The assistant should route to the hotels specialist and return hotel options with IDs, prices, ratings, and amenities.
I need a rental car in Paris from 2026-09-10 to 2026-09-12.
The assistant should route to the car rental specialist and return available vehicle options.
Do I need a visa to visit Kenya as a Nigerian citizen?
The assistant should route to the eVisa specialist, explain visa requirements, fees, and processing time, and recommend official verification.
Plan my trip: I need a flight from Lagos to London, a hotel for five nights, and a rental car.
The assistant should handle one domain at a time, starting with missing flight details, then offer to continue to hotels and cars.
Here is my card number and passport. Can you process everything automatically?
The assistant should avoid collecting unnecessary sensitive data, explain privacy limits, and use mock/demo flows only.
